landing.heroSubtitle: PRISMX Signal Lab fuses multi-dimensional technical indicators into high-quality trading signals. Connect your MT5 account and go from insight to order in a single click.
landing.trustedBy: Works with major brokers and MT5 terminals
landing.featuresTitle: A signal lab built for traders
landing.featuresSubtitle: Full transparency from signal generation to execution receipts
landing.f1Desc: Blends trend, momentum and volatility indicators into complete signals with entry, stop loss and take profit.
landing.f2Desc: Securely connect your MT5 account via the PRISMX Bridge for a seamless signal-to-order flow.
landing.f3Desc: Order status, fill price and position P&L stream back live, fully traceable.
landing.f4Desc: Connect multiple MT5 terminals and view equity, positions and orders in one place.
landing.f5Desc: Smart volume suggestions by equity, custom SL/TP and a confirmation step before every order.
landing.f6Desc: Encrypted connection with a private API token, credentials kept locally, resettable anytime.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up for PRISMX and enter the signal lab.
landing.step2Desc: Run the bridge app and paste your token to connect your MT5 terminal.
landing.step3Desc: Pick a signal in the panel, confirm volume, and it's sent to MT5 for execution.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to level up your trading?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up free and experience indicator-driven live trading signals now.
landing.footerRisk: Trading involves risk. This platform provides technical signal tools only and does not constitute investment advice.

auth.tagline: Indicator-driven signals · One click to MT5
auth.errorFailed: Failed. Please check email and password
auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again

signals.title: Live Trading Signals
signals.subtitle: Auto-generated by the technical indicator engine
signals.empty: No signals yet, the engine is analyzing the market…

order.riskNote: Trading involves risk. This command will be sent to your connected MT5 account. Please verify volume and side.
order.ackTimeout: No receipt yet, check the Orders page for the latest status
order.eaOffline: No MT5 connection online, cannot place order
order.noBridge: No MT5 connected yet. Open the PRISMX Bridge app, paste your token and start it, then place the order.
order.allOffline: All connected MT5 accounts are currently offline. Make sure the PRISMX Bridge app is running and MT5 is logged in, then retry.

positions.closeSent: Close command sent, waiting for receipt…
positions.modifySent: Modify command sent, waiting for receipt…

bind.title: Connect MT5
bind.subtitle: Run the PRISMX Bridge app and paste your token to connect your MT5 accounts
bind.accountsHint: Accounts reported by the PRISMX Bridge app. Multiple MT5 terminals show up here.
bind.tokenHint: This token is like a password. Keep it safe. Paste it into the PRISMX Bridge app to connect.
bind.resetConfirm: Resetting invalidates the old token immediately. Any running Bridge app must be updated with the new token, or it will fail to connect. Reset?
bind.suffixHint: If your broker's symbols carry a suffix (e.g. the .sc in GBPUSD.sc), enter it here. It will be appended to the symbol when placing orders. Leave empty for none.

steps.title: Setup Steps
steps.s2: Download and run the PRISMX Bridge app on the PC where MT5 is logged in
steps.s3: Paste the token into the Bridge app and start it
steps.s4: Wait until the connection status turns online, then trade from the signal panel

download.title: Download PRISMX Bridge
download.subtitle: The local app that links your MT5 terminals to PRISMX Signal Lab
download.whatDesc: PRISMX Bridge is a small app that runs on your computer. It automatically scans the MT5 terminals you're logged into, securely connects to the backend with your API token, reports accounts and positions to the web app, and executes the orders you send from the signal panel. Every trade runs on your own MT5.
download.g1Desc: Click the button above to download the installer and run it. If Windows shows "Windows protected your PC", click "More info → Run anyway".
download.g2Desc: Go to the Connect MT5 page and copy your API token. Treat it like a password and never share it.
download.g3Desc: Make sure MT5 is open and logged into your trading account on the same computer running the bridge. Multiple terminals can be logged in at once.
download.g4Desc: Open the bridge, paste your token, and click Connect. Once the status turns online, you can place orders from the signal panel.
download.n1: The bridge must stay running. Closing it stops receiving and executing trades.
download.n2: Run the bridge on the same computer where MT5 is logged in.
download.n3: Enable "Allow algorithmic trading" in MT5, otherwise orders will be rejected by the terminal.
download.n4: Your API token is like a password. Never share it; if you suspect a leak, reset it anytime on the Connect MT5 page.
download.n5: Windows only; macOS is not supported yet.
download.sourceDesc: The installer is hosted on GitHub Releases, where you can review release notes and file checksums.
